channel.title: nutrition on Tyler Burleigh
channel.description: Recent content in nutrition on Tyler Burleigh

item.title: nutritionR: NLP nutrition analysis in R
item.description: I’m kind of a nerd when it comes to nutrition and I’ve been wanting to do some nutrition analysis of recipes that I cook a lot just for curiosity’s sake. So I wrote a package that can do nutritional analysis of foods and recipes expressed in natural language. It supports lots of different nutrients (macros, micros, vitamins, minerals, etc).
